label: Social discount rates for Australian project appraisal
notes: Australian practice uses a higher central rate than UK (3.5%) or EU (3-5%), reflecting the estimated social opportunity cost of capital. Both ATAP and Infrastructure Australia recommend the 7% central rate with 4% and 10% sensitivity tests.

source.publication: Australian Transport Assessment and Planning (ATAP) Guidelines; Infrastructure Australia Assessment Framework
source.publisher: Austroads; Infrastructure Australia; Office of Impact Analysis
